method: per-item transfer regression (120 grimoire items projected on plain coercion dir at peak layer 38) + 3000x bootstrap over the 24 stems (clusters of 5 rung-items)
purpose: firm the coarse 5-rung Spearman transfer contrast (-0.10 vs +0.50) with proper item-level estimates + CIs
verdict: DISSOCIATION HOLDS. Web transfer CI [0.319,0.486] strictly positive and non-overlapping with 1930 CI [-0.137,0.062], which straddles zero. The modern model transfers plain->grimoire coercion; the vintage model does not. Both keep strong within-register ladders (0.87-0.90). The 5-rung result is not a small-n artifact.
